name: Grease
components: V, S, M (a bit of pork rind or butter)
description: Slick grease covers the ground in a 10-­‐‑foot square centered on a point within range and turns it into difficult terrain for the duration. When the grease appears, each creature standing in its area must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or fall prone. A creature that enters the area or ends its turn there must also succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or fall prone. Greater Invisibility 4th-­‐‑level illusion
